l:BlockLayoutCell.title: We At Kvriksha Technologies Private Limited

Text.text: From initial consultation to ongoing support, we offer end-to-end services that cover every aspect of your IT needs. Our dedicated support team is always here to assist you.
Our team comprises seasoned professionals with extensive experience in SAP ECC, S/4 HANA, S/4 HANA Cloud, Rise with SAP.

Providing expert SAP Functional consulting across modules like FI, CO, SD, MM, HCM, and PS. We deliver process optimization, configuration, implementation, and integration services to drive business efficiency.

We are efficient resource provider of SAP UI5, Fiori, CAPM, ABAP, RAP, SAP Build App, Build Process Automation, SAC, BW, AI-powered application transformation services for BTP and Functional consultant.
We also provide Training and Upskilling Programs in SAP UI5, Fiori, CAPM, and emerging SAP BTP technologies.
We have around 30+ SAP Consultant to provide services for our customers for Staffing process.
We serve global customer from Dubai, Singapore, US, Japan, Australia and India for SAP Technologies.
Empowering enterprises with integration, extension, and data-to-value capabilities through SAP BTP services, enabling innovation across applications, processes, and analytics.
Designing and modernizing enterprise applications with SAP UI5, Fiori, CAPM, ABAP, RAP with file storage using DMS.
Implementing SAP Build Apps, Build Process Automation, IRPA and AI-powered transformation services BTP and Functional consultant.
Unlocking real-time business value with SAP SAC and BW for smarter decision-making.
Our team comprises seasoned professionals with extensive experience in SAP ECC, S/4 HANA, S/4 HANA Cloud, Rise with SAP.
We offer Optical Character Recognition (OCR) solutions to digitize documents, automate data extraction, and streamline business processes with high accuracy with Document AI.
We take complete ownership of projects and deliver high-quality, end-to-end solutions on time, ensuring maximum value and customer satisfaction.
